## Type of Change

<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 💡 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (non-breaking change which improves code quality)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update (non-breaking change that doesn't affect functionality)

## Checklist

<!-- Please make sure all items are checked before merging. -->

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (`ruff format src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Self-review completed (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and all pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Changes are backward compatible (no breaking changes to public APIs)
- [ ] No sensitive information committed (API keys, tokens, credentials removed)

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing on local Hermes Agent + Feishu
